permits.Conditions: Flora and fauna surveys annually. Weed management program implementation.
Blasting restricted to 0800-1700 weekdays. Vibration monitoring at all nearby structures.
Waste rock dump stability monitoring quarterly. Geotechnical assessment annually.
Blasting restricted to 0800-1700 weekdays. Vibration monitoring at all nearby structures.
Noise levels not to exceed 45dB at nearest residence. Continuous noise monitoring required.
Maintain dust suppression systems operational at all times. Submit monthly monitoring reports.
